violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -Employee plated tortillas and arranged cooked chicken with bare hands, with hand wipe on apron and then gloves for adding toppings.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towels were out at hand sink. *Corrected on site-stocked immediately.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
